name: ecommerce-3d-mcp
description: MCP server for e-commerce 3D product visualization. Generate model-viewer embeds, AR try-on experiences, product configurators, Shopify integrations, and SEO metadata for 3D products.
author: Thomas Gorisse

tools.name: generate_product_3d
tools.description: Generate a <model-viewer> 3D embed for a product page

tools.name: create_ar_tryout
tools.description: Create an AR try-on experience (furniture, clothing, accessories)

tools.name: optimize_3d_asset
tools.description: Optimization report + CLI commands for 3D web assets

tools.name: shopify_snippet
tools.description: Generate Shopify Liquid code to embed 3D viewer

tools.name: seo_3d_metadata
tools.description: Generate schema.org structured data for 3D products
